channel.title: SPL - High Point Branch
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - High Point Branch

item.title: Homework Help
item.description:
Wednesday, April 1, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: High Point Branch, Meeting Room

Homework Help volunteers will be at this branch to assist K-12 students with school assignments during the school year. 

Event details

item.title: Youth Drop-in Chess
item.description:
Thursday, April 2, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: High Point Branch, Meeting Room

Youth Drop-in Chess for Children and Teens under 18 years of age. Come learn, practice and improve your chess playing skills.

Event details

item.title: English Conversation Circle
item.description:
Friday, April 3, 2026 at 12:30 PM

Location: High Point Branch, Meeting Room

Practice your English Conversation skills with other adult learners.Practique su inglés.Luyện tập tiếng Anh của quý vị.练习英语。練習英語。英会話の練習をしましょう。Ku Celceli Ingiriisigaaga.እንግሊዘኛዎንይለማመዱ።እንግሊዘኛኹምተለማመዱ።Afaan Ingilizii kee shaakali.Практикуйте вашу англійську.Практикуйтесь в английском языке.Pratiquez votre anglais.Practique seu inglês.

Event details

item.title: Family Story Time
item.description:
Saturday, April 4, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: High Point Branch, Meeting Room

At storytime, kids ages 0-5 and their families can enjoy stories, songs, and fun learning activities. 

Event details

item.title: Garden Hotline Presents: Container Gardening
item.description:
Saturday, April 4, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: High Point Branch, Meeting Room

Get the basics of container growing for your apartment or small spaces.

Event details

item.title: Where Does It Go? Practical tips for reducing waste in Seattle
item.description:
Wednesday, April 8, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: High Point Branch, Lobby

Join us to learn how to reduce waste and save money.
